overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic urban district. The scene features a mix of traditional residential architecture and towering futuristic structures, with palm-lined streets, neon billboards, and street vendors. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes through a narrow vendor-lined walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with mixed traditional and modern buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential buildings and storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in casual clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story residential building with yellow siding and white trim
vibrant blue two-story structure with external staircases
large illuminated billboard with yellow and blue 24/7 STORE signage atop a distant building
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk edge
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a quiet residential street in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward past a distinctive yellow house on the left and a blue building on the right. A large 24/7 STORE billboard dominates the distant skyline. Sparse pedestrian activity includes a man walking toward the camera. The environment shows signs of urban decay with overgrown vegetation and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic and crossing pedestrians

events.description: ego crosses the street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles
turns left onto a narrower walkway with green metal railing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection then turning left onto a narrower pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: weathered gray metal building with satellite dishes and industrial piping
wide intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals
red and white street sign indicating Crestmont intersection
green metal fence railing running along the sidewalk edge
tall cylindrical futuristic tower with the number 07 visible on its side

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider street intersection. The camera crosses the road, passing a Crestmont street sign, then turns left onto a narrower walkway bordered by a green metal railing. A gray industrial building appears on the left while the 24/7 STORE billboard remains visible in the distance. Sparse vehicle traffic includes a sedan passing through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway lined with food vendors and vending machines

events.description: passing colorful food trucks and vending machines lining the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor past various food vendors and automated stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the burrito food truck serving customers

entered.detail: green and yellow food truck with BURRITO signage and menu displays
bright pink automated food stall with illuminated menu panels
row of colorful automated vending machines with neon lighting
large concrete elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow walkway enclosed by buildings on the left and food vendors on the right. The path is lined with a green metal railing and features various food trucks including a prominent burrito stand and a pink automated stall. The futuristic Tower 07 looms in the background while an elevated highway overpass becomes visible ahead. The area has moderate foot traffic with people browsing the vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: crossing the wide intersection beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the final wide intersection with other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red and green lights visible
painted white crosswalk lines across the asphalt intersection
massive modern skyscrapers with glass facades and futuristic architecture

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings indicate an organized traffic system. The scene transitions from the enclosed vendor walkway to this open, bustling intersection with moderate vehicle and pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, decaying residential street toward a more industrial urban intersection. It begins by gliding past a distinctive yellow house and a blue building, moving through a landscape of overgrown vegetation and scattered debris under the gaze of a distant 24/7 STORE billboard. As the camera reaches a wider street intersection, it crosses the road past a Crestmont street sign while a lone sedan passes through the junction. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, transitioning from the open road onto a narrower walkway bordered by a green metal railing and a gray industrial building.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined commercial walkway into a sprawling, open urban intersection. It begins by navigating a narrow path enclosed by buildings and a green metal railing, passing a series of food trucks and a pink automated stall while the massive Tower 07 looms in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space gradually opens up, revealing an elevated highway overpass that begins to dominate the skyline. The scene then shifts from the vendor-lined corridor into a wide street, where the camera crosses a marked intersection alongside other pedestrians. Finally, the view expands to encompass a bustling cityscape of futuristic skyscrapers and organized traffic under the shadow of the overpass.
